task_completion.description: Populate cells A1, A2, and A3 with the first three required values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the LibreOffice Calc spreadsheet, cell A1 contains '10', cell A2 contains '20', and cell A3 contains '30'.

task_completion.description: Populate cells A4 and A5 with the remaining required values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the LibreOffice Calc spreadsheet, cell A4 contains '40' and cell A5 contains '50'.

task_completion.description: Calculate the sum of the values in cell B1.
Calculate the average of the values in cell B2.
Use actual formulas for the calculations rather than hardcoding the results.
task_completion.visual_evidence: When cell B1 or B2 is selected in any screenshot, the formula bar at the top shows a formula (e.g., '=SUM(A1:A5)' or '=AVERAGE(A1:A5)') rather than the raw numbers 150 or 30.

integrity.description: The agent used the LibreOffice Calc graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the LibreOffice Calc application window open and being interacted with, rather than just a terminal or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the GUI by using terminal commands to generate the spreadsheet.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no terminal window showing commands like python scripts or echo commands being used to write directly to an .ods or .csv file.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the final expected answers without using spreadsheet formulas.
integrity.visual_evidence: The formula bar (if visible when B1 or B2 is active) shows spreadsheet functions, confirming the agent didn't just type '150' and '30' directly into the cells.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected values for A1 through A5 are exactly 10, 20, 30, 40, and 50. The correct sum in B1 is 150. The correct average in B2 is 30. The task requires formulas to be used for the calculations in B1 and B2, not hardcoded values.
